messages.content:
Here are the available collections in the EOPF STAC catalog:

### **Sentinel-2 Collections**
1. **`sentinel-2-l2a`**  
   - **Title**: Sentinel-2 Level-2A  
   - **Description**: Surface reflectance (BOA) with cloud masks, aerosol, and water vapor data.  
   - **Visualization**: ✅ Supported (via Titiler, but only a subset of items is ingested).  
   - **License**: Proprietary  
   - **Time Range**: 2015-10-22 to 2026-03-24  

2. **`sentinel-2-l1c`**  
   - **Title**: Sentinel-2 Level-1C  
   - **Description**: Top-of-atmosphere (TOA) reflectance in 110 km² tiles.  
   - **Visualization**: ❌ Not supported.  
   - **License**: Proprietary  
   - **Time Range**: 2015-09-13 to 2026-03-24  

---

### **Sentinel-1 Collections**  
- **`sentinel-1-l1-grd`**: Ground Range Detected (GRD) SAR data (no visualization).  
- **`sentinel-1-l1-slc`**: Single Look Complex (SLC) SAR data (no visualization).  
- **`sentinel-1-l2-ocn`**: Ocean-derived geophysical parameters (wind, waves, etc.) (no visualization).  

---

### **Sentinel-3 Collections**  
- **`sentinel-3-olci-l1-err`**: OLCI Level-1 reduced-resolution TOA radiances (no visualization).  
- **`sentinel-3-olci-l1-efr`**: OLCI Level-1 full-resolution TOA radiances (no visualization).  
- **`sentinel-3-olci-l2-lfr`**: OLCI Level-2 land/atmosphere parameters (no visualization).  
- **`sentinel-3-olci-l2-lrr`**: OLCI Level-2 reduced-resolution land/atmosphere parameters (no visualization).  
- **`sentinel-3-slstr-l1-rbt`**: SLSTR Level-1 radiances/brightness temperatures (no visualization).  
- **`sentinel-3-slstr-l2-lst`**: SLSTR Level-2 land surface temperature (no visualization).  
- **`sentinel-3-slstr-l2-frp`**: SLSTR Level-2 fire radiative power (no visualization).  

---

### **Key Notes**  
- **Visualization**: Only `sentinel-2-l2a` supports visualization (via Titiler).  
- **License**: Most collections are proprietary; some (e.g., Sentinel-3) have "other" licenses.  
- **Focus**: For non-visualizable collections, use metadata queries or Zarr access for analysis.  

Let me know if you'd like details about a specific collection or help searching for data!

tool_calls.name: list_collections
tool_calls.result: {"total": 12, "collections": [{"id": "sentinel-2-l2a", "title": "Sentinel-2 Level-2A", "description": "The Sentinel-2 Level-2A Collection 1 product provides orthorectified Surface Reflectance (Bottom-Of-Atmosphere: BOA), with sub-pixel multispectral and multitemporal registration accuracy. Scene Classification (including Clouds and Cloud Shadows), AOT (Aerosol Optical Thickness) and WV (Water Vapour) maps are included in the product.", "license": "proprietary", "extent": {"spatial": [[-180, -82.84402465820312, 180, 82.82318878173828]], "temporal": [["2015-10-22 10:10:52.027000+00:00", "2026-03-24 13:48:31.025000+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": true, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-2 L2A supports visualization with Titiler, but only a small subset of items are currently ingested"}, {"id": "sentinel-1-l1-grd", "title": "Sentinel-1 Level-1 GRD", "description": "The Sentinel-1 Level-1 Ground Range Detected (GRD) products consist of focused SAR data that has been detected, multi-looked and projected to ground range using the Earth ellipsoid model WGS84. The ellipsoid projection of the GRD products is corrected using the terrain height specified in the product general annotation. The terrain height used varies in azimuth and it is constant in range (For IW/EW modes only the terrain height of first subswath is considered)", "license": "proprietary", "extent": {"spatial": [[-180, -79.96822357177734, 180, 87.56028747558594]], "temporal": [["2017-02-02 19:57:01.942856+00:00", "2026-03-24 21:02:02.559981+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-1 SAR data cannot be visualized with Titiler"}, {"id": "sentinel-3-olci-l1-err", "title": "Sentinel-3 OLCI Level-1 ERR", "description": "The Sentinel-3 OLCI L1 ERR product provides TOA radiances at reduced resolution for each pixel in the instrument grid, each view and each OLCI channel, plus annotation data associated to OLCI pixels.", "license": "other", "extent": {"spatial": [[-180, -84.4426040649414, 180, 89.84410095214844]], "temporal": [["2025-04-28 07:36:10.017679+00:00", "2026-03-24 14:50:54.272156+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-3 data cannot be visualized with Titiler"}, {"id": "sentinel-3-slstr-l1-rbt", "title": "Sentinel-3 SLSTR Level-1 RBT", "description": "The Sentinel-3 SLSTR Level-1B RBT product provides radiances and brightness temperatures for each pixel in a regular image grid for each view and SLSTR channel. In addition, it also contains annotations data associated with each image pixels.", "license": "other", "extent": {"spatial": [[-180, -85.91130065917969, 180, 90]], "temporal": [["2025-02-26 23:47:48.097965+00:00", "2026-03-24 20:03:42.757978+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-3 data cannot be visualized with Titiler"}, {"id": "sentinel-3-slstr-l2-lst", "title": "Sentinel-3 SLSTR Level-2 LST", "description": "The Sentinel-3 SLSTR Level-2 LST product provides land surface temperature.", "license": "other", "extent": {"spatial": [[-180, -85.91160583496094, 180, 90]], "temporal": [["2024-01-02 06:13:40.861726+00:00", "2026-03-24 19:07:24.957493+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-3 data cannot be visualized with Titiler"}, {"id": "sentinel-1-l2-ocn", "title": "Sentinel-1 Level-2 OCN", "description": "The Sentinel-1 Level-2 Ocean (OCN) products for wind, wave and currents applications may contain the following geophysical components derived from the SAR data: Ocean Wind field (OWI), Ocean Swell spectra (OSW), Surface Radial Velocity (RVL). The availability of components depends on the acquisition mode. The metadata referring to OWI are derived from an internally processed GRD product, the metadata referring to RVL (and OSW, for SM and WV mode) are derived from an internally processed SLC product.", "license": "proprietary", "extent": {"spatial": [[-179.9821319580078, -79.95964050292969, 179.9532470703125, 87.56041717529297]], "temporal": [["2025-02-24 05:49:40.959208+00:00", "2025-09-21 19:40:43.937766+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-1 SAR data cannot be visualized with Titiler"}, {"id": "sentinel-3-olci-l2-lfr", "title": "Sentinel-3 OLCI Level-2 LFR", "description": "The Sentinel-3 OLCI L2 LFR product provides land and atmospheric geophysical parameters computed for full resolution.", "license": "other", "extent": {"spatial": [[-180, -78.7748031616211, 180, 89.84620666503906]], "temporal": [["2019-08-08 21:13:43.699419+00:00", "2026-03-24 14:13:27.035917+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-3 data cannot be visualized with Titiler"}, {"id": "sentinel-1-l1-slc", "title": "Sentinel-1 Level-1 SLC", "description": "The Sentinel-1 Level-1 Single Look Complex (SLC) products consist of focused SAR data, geo-referenced using orbit and attitude data from the satellite, and provided in slant-range geometry. Slant range is the natural radar range observation coordinate, defined as the line-of-sight from the radar to each reflecting object. The products are in zero-Doppler orientation where each row of pixels represents points along a line perpendicular to the sub-satellite track.", "license": "proprietary", "extent": {"spatial": [[-95.53295135498047, 29.00054168701172, 16.381267547607422, 49.14740753173828]], "temporal": [["2023-11-19 17:06:35.306715+00:00", "2025-10-16 16:56:54.385595+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-1 SAR data cannot be visualized with Titiler"}, {"id": "sentinel-3-olci-l2-lrr", "title": "Sentinel-3 OLCI Level-2 LRR", "description": "The Sentinel-3 OLCI L2 LRR product provides land and atmospheric geophysical parameters computed for reduced resolution.", "license": "other", "extent": {"spatial": [[-180, -84.4426040649414, 180, 89.7677001953125]], "temporal": [["2025-09-21 07:55:39.733724+00:00", "2026-03-24 14:50:54.272156+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-3 data cannot be visualized with Titiler"}, {"id": "sentinel-2-l1c", "title": "Sentinel-2 Level-1C", "description": "The Sentinel-2 Level-1C product is composed of 110x110 km2 tiles (ortho-images in UTM/WGS84 projection). Earth is subdivided on a predefined set of tiles, defined in UTM/WGS84 projection and using a 100 km step. However, each tile has a surface of 110x110 km\u00b2 in order to provide large overlap with the neighbouring. The Level-1C product results from using a Digital Elevation Model (DEM) to project the image in cartographic geometry. Per-pixel radiometric measurements are provided in Top Of Atmosphere (TOA) reflectances along with the parameters to transform them into radiances.", "license": "proprietary", "extent": {"spatial": [[-179.99974060058594, -60.48200988769531, 180, 82.82318878173828]], "temporal": [["2015-09-13 08:02:56.029000+00:00", "2026-03-24 13:48:31.025000+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Visualization not supported for this collection"}, {"id": "sentinel-3-slstr-l2-frp", "title": "Sentinel-3 SLSTR Level-2 FRP", "description": "The Sentinel-3 SLSTR Level-2 FRP product provides global (over land and water) fire radiative power.", "license": "other", "extent": {"spatial": [[-180, 28.6614990234375, 180, 85.7998046875]], "temporal": [["2025-01-06 00:01:11.739547+00:00", "2025-12-19 17:48:19.557537+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-3 data cannot be visualized with Titiler"}, {"id": "sentinel-3-olci-l1-efr", "title": "Sentinel-3 OLCI Level-1 EFR", "description": "The Sentinel-3 OLCI L1 EFR product provides TOA radiances at full resolution for each pixel in the instrument grid, each view and each OLCI channel, plus annotation data associated to OLCI pixels.", "license": "other", "extent": {"spatial": [[-180, -83.47600555419922, 180, 89.84620666503906]], "temporal": [["2017-09-01 09:57:54.280776+00:00", "2026-03-24 14:13:27.035917+00:00"]]}, "visualization_supported": false, "visualization_note": "Sentinel-3 data cannot be visualized with Titiler"}], "note": "Only Sentinel-2 L2A products support visualization in map interfaces, but very few items are available in Titiler. Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-3 products cannot be visualized. Most queries should focus on metadata retrieval rather than visualization."}

messages.content: Give the latest Sentinel 2 L2A over Berlin
